reply.text: Crazy thought are you this put together when youre running late

messages.text: teddy got u in a brown top and light jeans combo
he succeeded i forgot what i was doing
u were probably doing nothing, relax
i was minding my business till the teddy glared
he glares at men who lie on apps
i already promised teddy id be respectful
teddy accepted, i did not sign anything
wait i actually screenshotted this already
crazy, cant relate, i only fold laundry
lies, those jeans folded my attention in half
at least ur self aware, slightly less tragic
let me take you out this week
